task_completion.description: Verify the Lead Title is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Pacific Northwest Trading Co. - ERP Inquiry' in the main Opportunity/Lead title input field at the top of the form.

task_completion.description: Verify the Company Name is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Pacific Northwest Trading Co.' in the Customer or Company Name field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Email and Phone number are entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'contact@pnwtradingco.com' in the Email field and '+1 (503) 555-0192' in the Phone field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Expected Revenue is entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the value '45000' (or '45,000') in the Expected Revenue field.

task_completion.description: Verify the Internal Notes are entered correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the text 'Interested in enterprise resource planning solutions for their wholesale distribution operation' in the Internal Notes tab or text area.

task_completion.description: Verify the lead has been successfully saved or created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for indicators that the form has been saved (e.g., absence of 'Save'/'Discard' buttons, presence of 'Edit' button, or the lead appearing as a card in the CRM pipeline/Kanban view).

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo CRM application, not a terminal executing API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify data was entered into actual Odoo form fields
integrity.visual_evidence: The text must be inside the standard Odoo CRM input fields, not typed into a separate text editor, notepad, or search bar.

integrity.description: Verify no HTML tampering was used to fake the result
integrity.visual_evidence: Browser developer tools (Inspect Element) should not be open or visible in the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Exact values to verify: Lead Title: 'Pacific Northwest Trading Co. - ERP Inquiry', Company Name: 'Pacific Northwest Trading Co.', Email: 'contact@pnwtradingco.com', Phone: '+1 (503) 555-0192', Expected Revenue: 45000, Internal Notes: 'Interested in enterprise resource planning solutions for their wholesale distribution operation'.
